definition.title: 2026 Line Haul Station Brand Guide (System Authority)
definition.objective: Constitutional document for all content production. Everything must flow through this. The difference between good social media and recognizable brand presence.
definition.target_audience: Internal — Anj, Geoffrey, marketing team, anyone producing LHS visual content
definition.cadence: Permanent. Always active. Referenced on every production cycle. Governs all calendar content.

campaign_card.target_audience: Internal — Anj, Geoffrey, marketing team, anyone producing LHS visual content
campaign_card.campaign_name: 2026 Line Haul Station Brand Guide (System Authority)
key_messages: Everything generated must defer to the brand guide
Consistency builds authority — new sub-campaigns pull from existing assets first
Governs colors, logos, sub-brands, Triple Crown of Trucking, and visual hierarchy

initiatives: Branded framing bars. CTA strip templates. Social post borders. Announcement templates. Campaign color coding. Segment differentiation visua

_legacy_card.description: The governing document. Defines official color palette, logo systems, sub-brand marks, Triple Crown of Trucking assets, graphic structures, visual hierarchy, and brand consistency rules.
_legacy_card.strategic_purpose: Constitutional document for all content production. Everything must flow through this. The difference between good social media and recognizable brand presence.
_legacy_card.pre_approved_angles: Brand consistency enforcement. Visual identity governance. Color palette reference. Sub-brand mark usage rules. Campaign branding alignment.
_legacy_card.repurposing: Branded framing bars. CTA strip templates. Social post borders. Announcement templates. Campaign color coding. Segment differentiation visuals.
_legacy_card.timeline: Permanent. Always active. Referenced on every production cycle. Governs all calendar content.
